name: Grow Your Game Golf Center
about: Grow Your Game Golf Center is an indoor golf training facility offering both private lessons and club fitting services. Founded in 2019 by Ken Moore, a 40-year golf industry veteran, the facility provides year-round training with a focus on data-driven improvement through advanced technology. The centerpiece is 'The Loft,' a custom club fitting studio opened in 2021 using Foresight GC Quad technology. The venue caters to golfers of all ages and skill levels with structured programs, personalized coaching, and comprehensive game development services.
why_golfers_like_it: Foresight GC Quad technology provides precise club fitting data
High-speed video analysis offers detailed swing feedback
Year-round indoor training with hitting bays and short game area
Personalized instruction from experienced coaches with tournament backgrounds
Structured improvement plans with measurable goals

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art launch monitor in The Loft fitting center

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club fittings provide equipment from major brands like Ping, Titleist, and Callaway. You can bring your own clubs for fitting or lessons.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned. BYOB policy is not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: No simulator gameplay details are provided, as the focus appears to be on lessons and fitting rather than virtual play.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility welcomes golfers of all ages and skill levels, with specific mention of junior programs and helping players at all levels grow their game.
